ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 66 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HarbourMasters/Shipwright
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HarbourMasters/Shipwright
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klipper3d/klipper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klipper3d/klipper
Language: c
Klipper is a 3d-printer firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
Language: c
OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenVPN/openvpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn
Language: c
OpenVPN is an open source VPN daemon

ns0:entry.ns0:title: betaflight/betaflight
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/betaflight/betaflight
Language: c
Open Source Flight Controller Firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: brunodev85/winlator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator
Language: c
Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: haproxy/haproxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/haproxy/haproxy
Language: c
HAProxy Load Balancer's development branch (mirror of git.haproxy.org)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libsdl-org/SDL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mpv-player/mpv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv
Language: c
🎥 Command line media player

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: c
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/Dopamine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/Dopamine
Language: c
Dopamine is a semi-untethered jailbreak for iOS 15 and 16

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwrt/openwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
Language: c
This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins. We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgvector/pgvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector
Language: c
Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres

A simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming

Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ http://www.windows-internals.com
